goal: FND-001-A static evolution/link requirement effective gate evidence

interfacePatterns.pattern: int GetEvoCost(Permanent permanent, CardSource cardSource, CardEffectCommons.IgnoreRequirement ignore, bool checkAvailability);

sourceRequirementGroups.title: ignore digivolution requirement permission and cannot-ignore restriction

factoryPatterns.pattern: effectName: "Ignore Digivolution requirements and change digivolution cost"

patterns.pattern: Static evolution requirement cannot-ignore restriction blocks permission
Static evolution requirement cannot-ignore restriction condition gates

evolutionFactoryPatterns.pattern: Digivolution cost must not be negative without a cost equation.

evolutionRuntimePatterns.pattern: BattleRules.CanDigivolve(state, action.Card, permanent, out var cost, _staticRequirements, _staticEffects)

byGroup.title: ignore digivolution requirement permission and cannot-ignore restriction

requiredTests: CardEffectFactory self evolution requirement maps to static descriptor
Static card color modifier affects digivolution color requirement
Static card level modifier feeds permanent level requirement
Static evolution requirement cannot-ignore restriction blocks permission
Static evolution requirement cannot-ignore restriction condition gates
Static evolution requirement condition gates target
Static evolution requirement hand source generates and executes
Static evolution requirement ignore permission generates and executes
Static evolution requirement ignore permission requires target gate
Static evolution requirement stops after source move
Static link cost modifier adjusts link cost
Static link requirement hand source generates and executes
Static link requirement uses effective metadata and level
Static requirement metadata criteria gates source and target

retainedBoundaries.reason: Original AddLinkRequirement factory evidence and headless static link descriptor/runtime evidence are present, but a source-facing headless CardEffectFactory AddSelfLinkConditionStaticEffect wrapper is not present. CS-11 closes descriptor/runtime effective gates only.

Ignore digivolution permission is represented by a common helper and cannot-ignore restriction path, not direct full-card source scaffold samples. It remains a boundary for full-card parity and trust rerun.
Full-card source effects remain NotRun and were not converted into parity pass evidence.

items: Map StaticEvolutionRequirementDescriptor reuse to AddDigivolutionRequirementClass/GetEvoCost source evidence before trusting production card scripts.
Map StaticLinkRequirementDescriptor reuse to AddLinkConditionClass/GetLinkCondition source evidence; keep missing source-facing factory wrapper as a review boundary.
Map CannotIgnoreDigivolutionRequirementDescriptor reuse to CannotIgnoreDigivolutionConditionClass and Player.CanIgnoreDigivolutionRequirement before trusting ignore-permission behavior.
Do not use CS-11 evidence to promote generated full-card source records while full-card parity remains NotRun.
